subcodes.first_line: O steadfast servant of the Truth! Praise be to God that thou art firm in the Cause and art clinging tenaciously to the mighty Covenant, free from calumny and reproach [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده ثابت حق الحمد لله در امر مستقیمی و متمسک بمیثاق شدید از تعرض و توهین
subcodes.subjects: @early Christian persecutions; the Pharisees, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for forgiveness, @consolation and comfort, @personal instructions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
